jobs.purpose: Nightly audit to catch (tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id) tuples with 2+ active team_members rows. Every finding is a P1 signal + fires TeamMemberInvariantViolated (see errors.json). This job's counter should always report 0 findings.
steps: SELECT tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id, COUNT(*) FROM team_members WHERE status='active' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
For each violation: emit critical audit row + increment academorix.teams.member_invariant.violations counter + page on-call

jobs.purpose: Hourly sweep of team_trials rows in status='in_progress' with ends_at + 24h past-due. Transitions them to 'completed' + fires TrialCompleted with completed_by=null (automated).
steps: SELECT id FROM team_trials WHERE status='in_progress' AND ends_at < now() - interval '24 hours' AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 500
For each: transition to status='completed' + set completed_at = now() + fire TrialCompleted (completed_by=null)

jobs.purpose: Fires on TrialConvertedToMember event. Runs the atomic trial-to-member conversion INSIDE a DB transaction: UPDATE trial SET status='converted' + INSERT team_members row. Refuses on uniqueness violation (rolls back the whole transaction).
steps: BEGIN transaction
SELECT * FROM team_trials WHERE id = ? FOR UPDATE
Refuse when trial.status != 'completed' (idempotency guard)
Refuse when active TeamMember row already exists for (team, trialist_type, trialist_id) (TRIAL_CONVERSION_MEMBER_EXISTS)
Refuse when team is at capacity (TRIAL_CONVERSION_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED)
UPDATE team_trials SET status='converted', decided_at=now(), decision_notes=?
INSERT INTO team_members (id, tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id, role_on_team, status, joined_at, ...) VALUES (...)
COMMIT
afterCommit: fire TrialConvertedToMember + TeamMemberJoined (in that order)

jobs.purpose: Individual trialist reminder dispatch. Scheduled at trial-create time (24h + 1h before starts_at). Fires the TrialScheduledNotification variant (T-24h / T-1h) unless the trial has been cancelled since scheduling.
steps: Load trial; refuse dispatch when status != 'scheduled' (may have been cancelled)
Refuse dispatch when the trialist has opted out of teams.trial_reminder category
Fire TrialScheduledNotification (reminder variant) via the notifications module

jobs.purpose: Daily sweep of archived teams past the 730-day retention hold. Hard-deletes ONLY when no downstream row still references (RESTRICT FKs enforce this at DB level).
steps: SELECT id FROM teams WHERE status='archived' AND deleted_at < now() - interval '730 days' LIMIT 500
For each: attempt hard delete; catch FK RESTRICT and record as 'retention_blocked' in metrics
Fires TeamDeleted per successful hard-delete

jobs.purpose: Every 5 min sweep to auto-flip Team.registration_opens_at / registration_closes_at windows. Fires TeamRegistrationOpened / TeamRegistrationClosed for the day's transitions.
steps: SELECT id FROM teams WHERE status='active' AND registration_opens_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_opens_at <= now() AND (last_registration_opened_notification IS NULL OR last_registration_opened_notification < registration_opens_at)
For each: fire TeamRegistrationOpened; set last_registration_opened_notification = now()

SELECT id FROM teams WHERE status='active' AND registration_closes_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_closes_at <= now() AND (last_registration_closed_notification IS NULL OR last_registration_closed_notification < registration_closes_at)
For each: fire TeamRegistrationClosed; set last_registration_closed_notification = now()
